entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in various agroclimatic environments including India, Syria, and Sudan

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in India and West Africa

entities.name: HISAR
entities.description: A chickpea-growing location in India

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: A chickpea-growing location in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where chickpea and pigeonpea are grown

entities.name: ALEPPO
entities.description: A chickpea-growing location in Syria

entities.name: SYRIA
entities.description: A country where chickpea is grown

entities.name: KHARTOUM
entities.description: A chickpea-growing location in Sudan

entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: A country where chickpea is grown

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The total amount of rainfall per year, specifically 600-1400 mm for pigeonpea in India

entities.name: GROWING PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the crop growth cycle, specifically 90-180 days for pigeonpea in India

entities.name: MAXIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The mean daily maximum temperature, specifically 22.5-30 degrees C for chickpea during flowering

entities.name: MINIMUM TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The mean daily minimum temperature, specifically 7.5-13 degrees C for chickpea during flowering

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The reproductive stage of chickpea that begins in January

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil on which chickpea and pigeonpea are grown

entities.name: ENTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil on which chickpea and pigeonpea are grown

entities.name: INCEPTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil on which chickpea and pigeonpea are grown

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil on which chickpea and pigeonpea are grown

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location with medium-deep Vertisol soil

entities.name: WATER-STORAGE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to hold water, specifically 150 mm in the studied Vertisols

entities.name: AVAILABLE SOIL WATER
entities.description: The amount of water in the soil available for plant use

entities.name: RAINY-SEASON FALLOW
entities.description: A period where land is left unseeded after the rainy season

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop grown during the rainy season

entities.name: WATER USE AND YIELD RELATIONSHIP
entities.description: A method used to compute probabilities of potential yield and phosphorus requirements

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus needed by the crop

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: A research center where chickpea yield probabilities were computed

entities.name: ISOCLIMES
entities.description: Lines on a map connecting points with the same climate, used to delineate pigeonpea-growing areas

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea-growing areas were delineated using isoclimes
